race.description: Select & Atlas Event And Party Hire Maiden Plate
race.comment: LELIYN (2) is building nicely and is destined to break through soon, beaten narrowly in his last two with the form around him stacking up strongly. Drawn sticky but is at peak fitness now. PAGANINI (3) returns short of what looks a preferred trip but has jumped out sharply in readiness. Expect him to sit off the early speed and look to cut them down late. TIKKAMOS (13) couldn't keep up with the highly promising Never Ordinary on debut but had jumped out sharply in readiness. Is sure to have come on from that and can play a more significant role this time. MYSTRIX (12) was well supported on debut back in November but couldn't go with them when they quickened. Has trialled well in readiness for her second prep and is worth a market watch.
